name: Yinhua Domestic Demand Selected Stock Fund(LOF)
summary: Yinhua Domestic Demand Selected Stock Fund(LOF) is a stock fund that focuses on investing in companies that benefit from domestic demand in China and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in companies with strong growth potential in the domestic market. It is managed by Yinhua Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
